metadata.name: GRI Standards (Global Reporting Initiative)
metadata.description: The GRI Standards are the world's most widely used standards for sustainability reporting. They enable organizations to report on their impacts on the economy, environment, and people in a comparable and credible way, thereby increasing transparency on their contribution to sustainable development.
metadata.version: GRI Universal Standards 2021 / GRI Topic Standards
metadata.classification_reasoning: GRI Standards are the most widely used global framework for sustainability reporting, adopted voluntarily by thousands of organizations and increasingly required by regulations like CSRD.
metadata.framework_purpose: To enable organizations to publicly communicate information about their most significant impacts on the economy, environment, and people, including on their human rights.
metadata.framework_scope: All organizations of any size, type, sector, or geographic location wishing to report on their sustainability impacts and performance.
framework_objectives: Provide comparable and consistent sustainability data
Enable alignment with global sustainability goals (SDGs)
metadata.target_audience: Sustainability Officers, ESG Teams, CFOs, Boards of Directors, Investor Relations, Legal/Compliance Teams, and stakeholders including investors, employees, and communities
adoption_approach: Determine the GRI Standards to use (In Accordance or GRI-Referenced)
Conduct materiality assessment to identify significant topics
Prepare sustainability report using GRI Standards

controls.title: Organizational Details
controls.description: Report the organization's legal name, nature of ownership and legal form, location of headquarters, countries of operation, and scale of the organization.
controls.full_text: Disclose fundamental organizational information including: legal name, nature of ownership, legal form, location of headquarters, countries where the organization operates or has significant activities, and the scale of the organization (employees, revenues, total assets, products/services offered).

controls.title: Governance Structure and Composition
controls.description: Report the governance structure, its composition, including information on the highest governance body and its committees, and processes for overseeing sustainability.
controls.full_text: Disclose the organization's governance structure, the composition of the highest governance body and its committees (gender, age, independence, other diversity), and processes for overseeing the organization's impacts on the economy, environment, and people.

controls.title: Statement on Sustainable Development Strategy
controls.description: Report a statement from the highest governance body or most senior executive about the relevance of sustainable development to the organization and its strategy.
controls.full_text: Provide a statement from the CEO or equivalent describing how sustainable development and its connection to the organization's strategy, operations, and reporting is prioritized. The statement should address how the organization creates value over the short, medium, and long term.
evidence_requirements: Integration of sustainability in business strategy

controls.title: Materiality Assessment Process
controls.description: Report the process the organization has used to determine its material topics.
controls.full_text: Conduct and report on a double materiality assessment identifying: (1) Topics with significant impacts on the economy, environment, and people (impact materiality), and (2) Topics representing significant risks or opportunities for the organization's financial performance (financial materiality). Describe the process, stakeholders consulted, and how priorities were determined.

controls.title: Direct Economic Value Generated and Distributed
controls.description: Report on the direct economic value generated and distributed, including revenues, operating costs, employee wages, payments to capital providers, payments to governments, and community investments.
controls.full_text: Disclose direct economic value generated (revenues) and distributed to: operating costs, employee wages and benefits, payments to capital providers, payments to government (taxes), community investments. Report the economic value retained (generated minus distributed).

controls.title: Energy Consumption Within the Organization
controls.description: Report on energy consumption within the organization from non-renewable and renewable sources, including fuel, electricity, heating, cooling, and steam.
controls.full_text: Disclose total energy consumption within the organization from non-renewable fuel sources, renewable fuel sources, purchased electricity/heat/steam/cooling, and self-generated electricity from renewables. Report energy intensity ratios. Report reductions in energy consumption achieved through conservation and efficiency initiatives.

controls.title: Scope 1 GHG Emissions
controls.description: Report on direct (Scope 1) greenhouse gas emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent.
controls.full_text: Disclose gross direct (Scope 1) GHG emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent, gases included in the calculation, base year, source of emission factors, and consolidation approach (equity share, financial control, or operational control). Report emissions by gas type and business unit where relevant.

controls.title: Scope 2 GHG Emissions
controls.description: Report on indirect (Scope 2) greenhouse gas emissions from purchased electricity, steam, heating, and cooling in metric tons of CO2 equivalent.
controls.full_text: Disclose gross location-based and market-based Scope 2 GHG emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent. For market-based method, disclose emissions factors used. Include sources of grid emission factors. Report reductions achieved through renewable energy certificates or power purchase agreements.
evidence_requirements: Scope 2 GHG emissions data (location and market-based)

controls.title: Scope 3 GHG Emissions
controls.description: Report on other indirect (Scope 3) greenhouse gas emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent, covering all relevant Scope 3 categories.
controls.full_text: Disclose gross Scope 3 GHG emissions across relevant upstream and downstream categories including: purchased goods and services, capital goods, fuel and energy activities, transportation, waste, business travel, employee commuting, investments, and use of sold products. Use GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain Standard.

controls.title: Water and Effluents
controls.description: Report on the organization's interaction with water, including water withdrawal, consumption, and discharge.
controls.full_text: Disclose total water withdrawal, water consumption, and water discharge by source and destination. Report water-related impacts and water stewardship activities. Identify operations in water-stressed areas. Report on targets for water reduction and recycling. Include water quality data for significant discharges.

controls.title: Waste
controls.description: Report on waste generated, diverted from disposal, and directed to disposal.
controls.full_text: Disclose total weight of waste generated by composition and disposal method. Report waste diverted from disposal through recovery, reuse, recycling, and composting. Report waste directed to disposal including incineration and landfill. Apply waste hierarchy to minimize waste generation.

controls.title: New Employee Hires and Employee Turnover
controls.description: Report on the total number and rate of new employee hires and employee turnover during the reporting period, by age group, gender, and region.
controls.full_text: Disclose total number and rate of new employee hires during the reporting period by age group, gender, and region. Disclose total number and rate of employee turnover by age group, gender, and region. Provide context for turnover rates compared to industry benchmarks.

controls.title: Occupational Health and Safety Management System
controls.description: Report on the occupational health and safety management system, including scope and whether workers are covered.
controls.full_text: Describe the occupational health and safety management system, whether it has been internally audited or certified to a recognized standard (ISO 45001), the scope of workers and activities covered, and any exclusions. Disclose the system's effectiveness in preventing work-related injuries and ill health.

controls.title: Diversity of Governance Bodies and Employees
controls.description: Report on the percentage of individuals within the organization's governance bodies and employee categories by gender, age group, and other diversity categories.
controls.full_text: Disclose the percentage of individuals in governance bodies (board, committees) by gender, age group, minority group membership, and other indicators of diversity. Disclose employee diversity by gender, age group, and other relevant diversity categories by employee category.

controls.title: Supplier Social Assessment
controls.description: Report on the percentage of new suppliers screened using social criteria.
controls.full_text: Disclose the percentage of new suppliers screened using social criteria including labor practices, human rights, health and safety, and community impacts. Report the number of suppliers assessed for social impacts, negative impacts identified, and actions taken. Describe supplier engagement on social issues.
evidence_requirements: Human rights due diligence in supply chain

controls.title: Customer Health and Safety
controls.description: Report on assessment of health and safety impacts of product and service categories.
controls.full_text: Disclose the percentage of significant product/service categories for which health and safety impacts are assessed for improvement. Describe processes for ensuring product and service health and safety. Report on incidents of non-compliance with regulations related to product health and safety.

controls.title: External Assurance
controls.description: Report whether the organization seeks external assurance for its sustainability reporting, the scope and basis of assurance, and the relationship with the assurance provider.
controls.full_text: Disclose whether the organization seeks external assurance for its GRI report or related sustainability data. If assurance is obtained, describe the scope, standard used (ISAE 3000, AA1000), the assurance level (reasonable or limited), the assurance provider's relationship with the organization, and conclusions.

controls.title: Biodiversity
controls.description: Report on operational sites owned, leased, managed in, or adjacent to protected areas and areas of high biodiversity value.
controls.full_text: Disclose all operational sites in or adjacent to protected areas or areas of high biodiversity value. Describe significant direct and indirect impacts on biodiversity in protected and high-value areas. Report on biodiversity risk assessments and conservation strategies.
evidence_requirements: Site location mapping near protected areas

controls.title: Local Community Engagement
controls.description: Report on operations with local community engagement, impact assessments, and development programs.
controls.full_text: Disclose the percentage of operations with implemented local community engagement, impact assessments, and development programs. Describe community engagement approaches, grievance mechanisms for communities, and significant positive and negative impacts on local communities.

controls.title: Approach to Stakeholder Engagement
controls.description: Report the categories of stakeholders the organization engages with and the approach to stakeholder engagement.
controls.full_text: Describe the categories of stakeholders (employees, investors, customers, suppliers, communities, regulators) and the basis for identifying and selecting stakeholders. Report the approach to engaging each stakeholder category, the key topics raised by stakeholders, and how the organization has responded to their interests.
